# Package

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="Package icon">

<div class="dioxus-icons-widget" data-icon-name="Package" data-svg="&lt;svg xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot; width=&quot;24&quot; height=&quot;24&quot; viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; 20.71 7&quot;&gt;&lt;/polyline&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;m7.5 4.27 9 5.15&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;" data-size="24" data-color="#000000" data-stroke="2"><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-header"><div class="a-s">&quot;#000000&quot;</span><span class="a-p">,</span><span> </span><span class="a-pr">stroke_width</span><span class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-co">2</span><span> data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Package;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Package { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
box, container, storage, sealed, delivery, undelivered, unopened, packed, archive, zip, module

## Categories
files, development

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/package)
